BrokerMaintenance.description:
Maintenance-window envelope. Single source of truth for both the
list endpoint (broker_maintenance field on AccountListResponse) and
the legacy 503 envelope used by _classify_sidecar_failure.
BrokerMaintenance.title: BrokerMaintenance

post.description: Phase 7a D4 — wipe Schwab tokens (always); optionally wipe Tier-2 creds.

schema.title: Response Disconnect Schwab Api Admin Brokers Schwab Disconnect Post
Response Schwab Oauth Callback Admin Api Admin Brokers Schwab Oauth Callback Post

get.description:
Operator-only: returns sidecar-side (account_number, account_hash, mode)
for a broker gateway label.

Used to discover SCHWAB_PAPER_ACCOUNT_HASH for the C0 empirical hard-gate
script (and equivalent operator workflows for other brokers). Bypasses the
boundary-stripping in AccountResponse / _account_from_proto by reading
response.accounts directly from the sidecar's ListManagedAccounts gRPC.

`label` is the gateway label (e.g. "schwab", "isa-paper", "futu",
"alpaca-paper") — not the broker_id.

schema.title: Response List Broker Account Hashes Api Admin Brokers  Label  Account Hashes Get
Response Reconfigure Api Admin Brokers  Label  Reconfigure Post
Response List Config Api Admin Config Get
Response Issue Confirmation Nonce Api Admin Csrf Issue Post
Response Set Order Capability Api Admin Order Capabilities Post
Response List Secrets Api Admin Secrets Get

get.description: Autocomplete proxy: forward to one healthy sidecar, cache 5 min.

Public Schwab OAuth callback. CF-Access-bypassed.

v0.7.4: state restored to the authorize URL. Manual-flow URLs may
still omit state, in which case CSRF protection falls back to
redirect_uri byte-match only.

schema.title: Response Schwab Oauth Callback Public Api Oauth Schwab Callback Get

get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream for order updates.

Clients may send a ``Last-Event-ID`` HTTP header to replay missed events
since that event id before tailing the live pubsub channel (P14).
